# rssi

**Instance Property**

The Received Signal Strength Indicator (RSSI), in decibels, of the peripheral.

## Declaration

```swift
var rssi: NSNumber? { get }
```

## Discussion

Returns a number, in decibels, that indicates the RSSI of the peripheral while connected to the central manager. You can use a connected peripheral’s RSSI property to determine the peripheral’s proximity. The default value of this property is `nil`; the first successful call to [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBPeripheral/readRSSI()] sets its value.

## Accessing a Peripheral’s Signal Strength

- **readRSSI()**: Retrieves the current RSSI value for the peripheral while connected to the central manager.
